A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent limited the candidate set to the first 20 purchase_ids from the reviews (query_db:26 with LIMIT 20) and used only those in the books lookup (query_db:42), while repeated execute_python SyntaxErrors prevented a complete cross-database join, resulting in missing many valid 'Literature & Fiction' English books with perfect 5.0 averages.

FM1: no
FM2: no

FM4: yes
